## Spring Boot Application Setup

This workspace contains a Spring Boot 3.x application built with Maven and Java 17.

### Project Information
- Framework: Spring Boot 3.x
- Build Tool: Maven
- Java Version: 17
- Package Manager: Maven Central

### Development Setup
1. All dependencies are managed through Maven
2. The project follows Spring Boot best practices
3. Standard Maven project structure in place

### Running the Project
Use the provided VS Code tasks to build and run the application.

### Additional Notes
- The application is ready for customization
- Add new dependencies via pom.xml as needed
